evolution_note: Auto-evolved: Multi-exit scaling, $20K liquidity filter, rug pre-screening

learned_rules.insight: 50% at 10% + 25% at 20% + 25% trailing captures gains while riding winners longer
Rugs cost 21x more than stop losses ($20K liquidity cuts rug rate 50%)
learned_rules.action: Skip if liquidity < $20K, holders < 50, or dev sells detected

learned_rules.insight: Move stop to breakeven+ after +8% profit protects capital
A+ at 80+ score with 40% position (vs 30%) increases returns
learned_rules.action: 40% position size for A+, skip A/B

learned_rules.insight: Older coins (>18h) have less momentum, skip them
Week 2-6 show higher win rates than Week 1 (ramp up gradually)
learned_rules.action: Start month with smaller sizes, scale up
